news.title: HCM City kicks off 14th National Red Journey 2026 and 'Red Drop from the City named after President Ho Chi Minh' blood drive
news.content: On the morning of June 11, 2026, the opening ceremony of the 14th National Red Journey 2026 and the 'Red Drop from the City named after President Ho Chi Minh' blood donation festival took place in Ho Chi Minh City.

news.title: HCM City launches National Voluntary Blood Donation Day on April 7
news.content: Spreading humanity at the blood donation festival: On the morning of April 9, the Ho Chi Minh City Steering Committee for Voluntary Blood Donation Mobilization organized the launching ceremony of 'National Voluntary Blood Donation Day' (April 7, 2026) in Binh Duong Ward.

news.title: Golden Blood System strengthens security, achieves Information Security Certification
news.content: The Golden Blood System has officially been granted the information security assessment certificate by Quang Trung Software City (QTSC), following a comprehensive test according to OWASP Top 10 and OWASP API Security Top 10 standards.

news.title: Red Spring Festival receives more than 1,000 blood units
news.content: On January 16, the Ho Chi Minh City Steering Committee for Voluntary Blood Donation Mobilization held a summary meeting on voluntary blood donation work in 2025 and launched the Lunar New Year 'Red Spring Festival 2026' blood drive.

news.title: Red Sunday at AEON MALL Binh Tan
news.content: Ho Chi Minh City - Blood Transfusion and Hematology Hospital in coordination with partners cordially invites residents, businesses, and the entire community to join the 'Red Sunday' blood drive at AEON MALL Binh Tan on November 30, 2025.

news.title: Launching lunchtime blood donation campaign 'Lunch Break, Life-Saving'
news.content: Ho Chi Minh City - In order to facilitate favorable conditions for the public to participate in voluntary blood donation, the Blood Transfusion and Hematology Hospital officially launches the lunchtime blood donation campaign 'Lunch Break, Life-Saving', taking place from November 17, 2025 to December 17, 2025.

news.title: The woman who donated blood 110 times to save lives
news.content: Amidst the hustle and bustle of life, there are still people silently giving life – not with grand gestures, but with drops of loving red blood. One of these exemplary role models is Ms. Huynh Thi My An...

news.title: Red Sunday blood donation festival on November 9, 2025 at 68 Nguyen Hue
news.content: Ho Chi Minh City - Blood Transfusion and Hematology Hospital coordinates with partners to organize the blood donation day on Sunday, November 9, 2025 at 68 Nguyen Hue (Saigon Ward, Ho Chi Minh City)...

news.title: Review Conference on Voluntary Blood Donation Mobilization for first 6 months of 2025 in HCMC
news.content: On August 8, 2025, in Ho Chi Minh City, Blood Transfusion and Hematology Hospital solemnly held the Review Conference on Voluntary Blood Donation Mobilization for the first 6 months of 2025.

news.title: Urgent: Blood groups A, B, AB, and O desperately needed
news.content: Currently, the reserves at the Blood Transfusion and Hematology Hospital are gradually declining. In order to ensure timely supply of blood in Ho Chi Minh City and the Western provinces, the HCMC Humanitarian Blood Donation Center cordially appeals to the public.

news.title: HCMC appeals for public blood donation to save lives
news.content: Ho Chi Minh City is entering the student summer vacation, leading to a serious drop in blood reception over past days, down to only 50% of routine. We appeal to all citizens and youth to join...

news.title: Opening of the 13th Red Journey campaign in HCMC
news.content: On the morning of June 25, at the Dormitory Management Center and HCMC National University Urban Area, the HCMC Steering Committee for Voluntary Blood Donation Mobilization opened the 13th Red Journey program...

news.title: Warning about fraud schemes targeting blood donors
news.content: Currently, high-tech criminals employ sophisticated schemes to defraud and misappropriate assets. Some individuals impersonate the Blood Transfusion and Hematology Hospital and the Humanitarian Blood Donation Center to make scam calls...

news.title: Kickoff of Humanitarian Month 2025: Humanitarian Journey - Spreading Love
news.content: On May 8, in HCMC, the Vietnam Red Cross Central Committee and HCMC People's Committee coordinated to organize the national launch ceremony of Humanitarian Month 2025 under the theme 'Humanitarian Journey - Spreading Love'.

news.title: National Voluntary Blood Donation Day on April 7, 2025
news.content: On April 7, we look together towards a meaningful occasion - the National Day for Voluntary Blood Donation.
